zh.Patcham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可帕哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Shelley於1534年出生在英國素可可拉法姆時，他的父親John Shelley40歲，母親Ann Agmondsham41歲。他和Joyce Hill至少有1個兒子。他去世於1594年10月8日在英國素可帕哈姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.Patcham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰素可帕哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Shelley于1534年出生在英国素可可拉法姆时，他的父亲John Shelley40岁，母亲Ann Agmondsham41岁。他和Joyce Hill至少有1个儿子。他去世于1594年10月8日在英国素可帕哈姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Shelley was born in 1534, in Clapham, Sussex, England, his father, John Shelley, was 40 and his mother, Ann Agmondsham, was 41. He had at least 1 son with Joyce Hill. He died on 8 October 1594, in Patcham, Sussex, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Shelley est né en 1534, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Shelley, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ann Agmondsham, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joyce Hill. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1594, à Patcham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Shelley 1534 in Clapham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Shelley 40 und seine Mutter Ann Agmondsham 41. Er hatte mit Joyce Hill mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1594 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Patcham, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Shelley è nato il nel 1534 nel Clapham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Shelley, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ann Agmondsham, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joyce Hill. Morì il 8 ottobre 1594, nel Patcham, Sussex, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Shelleyが1534年にイギリススセックスクラファムで生まれた時，父John Shelleyは40歳，母Ann Agmondshamは41歳であった。彼はJoyce Hillとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1594年10月8日にイギリススセックスプアトチャムで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Shelley(이)가 1534년 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shelley(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Agmondsham(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Joyce Hill(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1594년 10월 8일 영국 수세스 패트챔에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Shelley nasceu em 1534, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shelley, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ann Agmondsham, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joyce Hill. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1594, em Patcham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Shelley родился в 1534 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Shelley было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Agmondsham, 41. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joyce Hill. Он умер 8 октября 1594 г. в местности пачам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Shelley nació en 1534, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Shelley, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ann Agmondsham, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joyce Hill. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1594, en Patcham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
